description: Welcome to Southwynd! This beautiful south-facing corner unit offers exceptional flexibility with up to potentially 5 bedrooms. Featuring 3 spacious bedrooms on the upper level, a bedroom/den on the lower level, and an office/den/bedroom off the main floor, this home is ideal for families of all sizes. Bright and modern with a functional layout, stylish updates, and a gourmet kitchen. Recent improvements include a new hot water tank, A/C, some fresh paint, updated fixtures, and a custom feature wall. Located in a well-maintained, landscaped community close to amenities, schools, and parks. The listing agent, Priscilla, is personally offering a $500 gift card to The Keg to a buyer who has an accepted offer before the end of February that results in a sale!
